t_ch: 此处位置偏僻，他们留下的东西基本还保持着原样。
t_en: We're really remote, and everything that's been left behind here is basically still in its original state.

t_ch: 为了不打扰你的仪式，我没有提前翻找。那么现在开始吧。
t_en: I didn't rummage around out of respect for your ceremony. So let's get started on that right now.

t_ch: 你究竟在想什么？！做出这种事情——你难道不知道可能有队员会因此丧命吗？！
t_en: What the heck were you thinking, pulling a stunt like that? ...Don't you know that could get someone killed!?

t_ch: 是。我承认这事儿干得不地道，是我对不起他们…但我还不是为了你吗？
t_en: Yes. I confess that this wasn't the best idea, and I'm sorry about them... But am I not doing all this for you?

t_ch: 只要再多点资金，我们就有可能在集市拥有更大的店面，过上更好的生活了！
t_en: If we just got a little more funding, we could have our own bigger stall at the market and live a better life!

t_ch: …为了我？别再给你的卑劣找借口了！可笑…在一起这么多年，我竟然到现在才认清你的真面目！
t_en: ...For me? Stop making excuses for your own despicability! What a joke... All these years together, and I've only just seen your true colors now!

t_ch: 你别再无理取闹了，不就是替换了一些无关紧要的物资吗，我有分寸。
t_en: Stop being so unreasonable. It's just replacing some not-so-important supplies. I know when to stop.

t_ch: 再说了，事情都是*拉达曼*主导的，我顶多算个帮手。
t_en: And besides, Rhadaman is the one who directed everything. I'm just an assistant at best.

t_ch: 行了，别再揪着这点事不放了——你这种天天待在花园搞研究的，根本不明白现在生活的压力有多大，就不能多体谅我一点吗？
t_en: Okay, okay, stop going on about that one thing already — it's people like you who just sit around in the Garden researching all day who have no idea how stressful everyday life has become. Can't you think about me once in a while?

t_ch: 算了，我不想和你吵架，都先各自冷静一下吧。
t_en: Forget about it. I don't want to argue with you. Let's both just calm down for a second.

t_ch: 短暂的沉默过后，哈德斯径自离去；波瑟芬妮目送他走远，随即将什么东西藏进了脚下的软垫中。
t_en: After a lull of silence, Hadez leaves. Possephone watches as he goes, before stashing something inside a small cushion under her feet.

t_ch: 你拎起软垫，掂了掂，发现这玩意比看起来要更重一些。你努力在不破坏软垫的前提下将它拆开，发现里面是一块<color=#dbc291ff>石板</color>。
t_en: You pick up the small cushion and weigh it in your hand to discover that it's heavier than it looks. As you try to open it up without damaging anything, you uncover a <color=#dbc291ff>slate</color> tucked inside.

t_ch: …不行，不能坐以待毙……
t_en: ... No, we can't just sit here on our butts and do nothing...

t_ch: 真是讽刺，我原本就是为了他才进行调查的…却没想到最危险的不是城里，而是他的身边……
t_en: How ironic. He was the whole reason I started the investigation... I never thought that the most dangerous place of all wasn't somewhere in the city, but right next to him...

t_ch: 原来神谕里说的「身陷险境」，竟是这个意思……
t_en: So this is what the oracle meant by being "in peril"...

t_ch: 即便如此，我依旧不后悔…与其像个傻子似的被蒙骗，不如早些认清他的真面目。
t_en: Even so, I still don't regret anything... I just wish I'd seen through his mask a lot earlier instead of allowing myself to get played like a fool.

t_ch: …振作起来，波瑟芬妮，振作起来…趁他们还没下定决心对你动手……
t_en: ...Pull yourself together, Possephone. Come on now... before they've decided to do away with you...

t_ch: 只要好好利用那些游荡的泰坦眷属，一定能够找到机会脱身……
t_en: So long as I put those wandering Titankin to good use, I'll find a chance to escape...

t_ch: 你沉默地从角落里翻出那个布满泥污的背包，取出了里面属于波瑟芬妮的<color=#dbc291ff>传信石版</color>。
t_en: Silently, you pull the backpack soaked in mud from out of the corner and fish out Possephone's <color=#dbc291ff>teleslate</color> from within.

t_ch: …是波瑟芬妮引来的？啧，果然留不得她…咦…奇怪，卷轴怎么没反应……
t_en: ...So, Possephone attracted them here? Tsk, I really cannot keep her around anymore... Hmm, that's weird, why is the scroll not working...

t_ch: ■■■■■！拉达曼，你竟然算计我——？！！
t_en: ■■■■■! Rhadaman, you would dare scheme against me...!?

t_ch: 回忆戛然而止，最后停留在你脑海中的，是男人喑哑的嘶吼与绝望的脸。
t_en: The memories reach an abrupt end. The last thing that you sense in your mind is the man's hoarse screams and his face of despair.

t_ch: 你俯身，从地上捡起一个破破烂烂的<color=#dbc291ff>卷轴</color>。
t_en: You reach down to pick up a tatty old <color=#dbc291ff>scroll</color>.

t_ch: 如何，有什么发现吗？
t_en: Hmm? Find anything?

t_ch: 讨论一下「石板」。
t_en: Talk about the "slate."

t_ch: 赫卡忒沉默地阅读起手中的石板，随着时间流逝，她的脸色变得愈发阴沉。
t_en: Hekate silently reads the slate in her hand and, as time passes, her face grows ever more somber.

t_ch: …自去年以来，城中多个探险队的物资相继出现了问题，包括即将过期的应急食物、混着杂草的药物、各种残次品卷轴……
t_en: ...Ever since last year, we've had problems with many expedition teams' supplies in the city, including emergency rations nearing the expiry date, grass and weeds mixed in with medicinal herbs, and defective scrolls...

t_ch: 我们很早开始就在调查偷换物资的犯人，但始终没有进展。
t_en: We started investigating burglaries early on, but never made any progress.

t_ch: 那个拉达曼，和波瑟芬妮一样是生命花园的园丁，平日里的品行端正，没想到……
t_en: That Rhadaman was a Gardener in the Garden of Life — just like Possephone. He was always an upstanding kind of guy. I never took him for...

t_ch: 至于哈德斯…啧…我就知道那家伙不是什么好东西！
t_en: And as for Hadez... Tsk, I always knew that guy was a crook!

t_ch: 讨论一下「传信石版」。
t_en: Talk about the "teleslate."

t_ch: 你将方才目睹的情景讲给赫卡忒。只见她唇角抿起，脸色稍显苍白；不经意间，你发现她握着传信石版的手竟微微有些颤抖。
t_en: You fill Hekate in on what you just saw. Her lips tighten, and the color drains from her face. You notice her hand holding the teleslate starts quivering.

t_ch: 赫卡忒熟练地将传信石版解锁，翻找半晌，终于发现了一份隐藏文件。
t_en: Hekate unlocks the teleslate with an experienced flick and searches around for a while before finally pulling up a hidden document.

t_ch: 文件记录了波瑟芬妮与哈德斯争执的全过程，其中包括波瑟芬妮如何揭露拉达曼的罪行、与哈德斯苍白无力的辩解。
t_en: It's a record of the entire dispute between Possephone and Hadez, including how Possephone exposed Rhadaman's crimes and Hadez's weak defense.

t_ch: 好姑娘，波瑟芬妮…真是个勇敢的好姑娘……
t_en: Good girl, Possephone... You really are a good, brave girl, aren't you...

t_ch: 我会帮你把这份证据带回去，让所有人都知道……
t_en: I'll help you take this evidence back so everyone can know the truth...

t_ch: 讨论一下「卷轴」。
t_en: Talk about the "scroll."

t_ch: 你将方才所见转述给赫卡忒，换来对方一阵咬牙切齿的大笑——
t_en: You recount to Hekate what you just saw, who replies with a big snarling laugh...

t_ch: 哈、哈哈哈——活该！真是活该！塔兰顿在上…这是他应得的！
t_en: Ha... Hahaha... Serves him right! It really does! By Talanton's grace... that's what he deserves!

t_ch: 半晌，赫卡忒稍稍冷静下来，指了指你手中的卷轴。
t_en: Hekate later calms down enough to point at the scroll you're holding.

t_ch: 这玩意叫「艾格勒之光」，使用后会有明亮的光团从卷轴中释放，极其瞩目。
t_en: This thing is called the "Light of Aquila," and it releases a bright ball of light out of the scroll after you've used it. It's quite bright and noticeable.

t_ch: 由于城外无法使用传信石版，人们通常会使用这种卷轴来传递消息、确认位置。而这张明显是残次品，根本用不了……
t_en: Since teleslates can't be used outside the city, people often use these kinds of scrolls to send messages and confirm locations. This one's obviously defective, though, and no use at all...

t_ch: 塔兰顿不会放过任何罪人…他是活该！
t_en: Talanton will spare no sinner... He deserves it!

t_ch: 不过…这样看来，拉达曼确实参与其中…恐怕他原本就计划将两个人都除掉吧……
t_en: However... Now that I think about it... if Rhadaman was involved... I'm afraid his original plan was to get rid of both the husband and wife...

t_ch: 以上就是全部了？好，我们来稍微梳理一下信息吧。
t_en: Is that all there is? Alright, let's go through what we know once more.

t_ch: 首先，波瑟芬妮注意到了探险队里的「劣质物资」问题，一路追查到了拉达曼，并掌握了对方的罪证；但与此同时，拉达曼也得知了此事。
t_en: First, Possephone noticed dodgy supplies sent to the expedition team, traced it back to Rhadaman, and secured ironclad evidence of his guilt. However, during this process, Rhadaman came to learn about everything.

t_ch: 察觉到危险，波瑟芬妮跟随哈德斯出城避难，却没想到自己的丈夫也参与其中。
t_en: Sensing potential danger, Possephone followed Hadez out of the city to escape and had no idea that her husband was actually caught up in everything.

t_ch: 在外期间，波瑟芬妮得知哈德斯与拉达曼勾结的真相，并因此受到威胁；她偷偷录下证据，想要借助游荡的泰坦眷属吸引他们的注意力并逃脱。但……
t_en: While outside the city, Possephone learned the truth about Hadez being in cahoots with Rhadaman, and she was threatened. She secretly recorded some evidence and planned on using wandering Titankin as a distraction to make her escape. However...

t_ch: 总之，营地遭到了袭击，哈德斯想使用「艾格勒之光」求救，却没想到携带的正是无法使用的劣质物资……
t_en: Anyway, the camp was attacked and Hadez tried using a "Light of Aquila" to send for help — never realizing that he was in fact using dodgy supplies himself...

t_ch: 以上是我的分析…你还有什么要补充的吗？
t_en: That's my analysis of the situation... Anything else to add?

t_ch: 暂时没有了。
t_en: Not for now.

t_ch: 应该没什么疏漏。
t_en: I think that covers everything.

t_ch: 嗯，那回去吧。德墨忒尔婶婶还在等我们。
t_en: Okay, let's head back then. Aunty Demetria is still waiting for us.

t_ch: 啊…回来了、你们回来啦…一路辛苦了，怎么样，有找到什么吗？
t_en: Ah... You're back, you're back... You've been through so much. How was it? Did you find anything?

t_ch: …我们确实找到一些线索。
t_en: ...Actually, we did find a few clues out there.

t_ch: 赫卡忒与你对视一眼，将你们在营地的发现一五一十地讲给德墨忒尔。
t_en: Hekate shoots you a glance and recounts to Demetria everything you discovered at the camp.

t_ch: …是、是这样啊…那…那你们说…我的波瑟芬妮……
t_en: ...I—I see... So then... You mean, my darling Possephone...

t_ch: 老人的声音中带着微不可察的哀痛与恳求。赫卡忒嘴角微微动了动，最终还是向你投来求助的目光——
t_en: Traces of almost imperceptible sorrow and pleading color the old woman's words. The corners of Hekate's mouth twitch ever so slightly, but she finally looks up at you for help...

t_ch: 我觉得吧，波瑟芬妮大概率遭了哈德斯的毒手。
t_en: I think there is a very strong chance that Possephone was killed by Hadez.

t_ch: 哈德斯见事情败露，所以干脆一不做二不休……
t_en: Hadez realized the game was up, so he decided to just go whole hog...

t_ch: …啊…是这样吗……
t_en: ...Ah... I see...

t_ch: 容我再思考一番…
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 没错，我就是这么认为的。
t_en: That's right. That's what I think.

t_ch: 您放心，德墨忒尔婶婶，无论如何我都会继续寻找，把波瑟芬妮给您带回来的。
t_en: Don't worry, Aunty Demetria — I'll keep searching for her no matter what. I'll bring your Possephone back for you.

t_ch: …好…好孩子…波瑟芬妮…谢谢…我的波瑟芬妮……
t_en: ...Thank you... Good child... Possephone... My Possephone...

t_ch: 老人眼神放空，面色一派恍惚颓然，开始喃喃自语起来。
t_en: Her eyes glaze over, and her face is in a daze as she starts mumbling to herself.

t_ch: 让婶婶自己静一静吧…我也需要再冷静一下。
t_en: Let Aunty Demetria cool off for a while... I personally need to cool off, too.

t_ch: 辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。这是报酬，请收好。
t_en: Great work, {NICKNAME}. Thank you so much. Here's your reward, there you go.

t_ch: 依我之见，波瑟芬妮应该并没有死在哈德斯手上。
t_en: The way I see it, Possephone probably wasn't killed by Hadez.

t_ch: 当然，这并不代表她还活着——只是考虑到老人现在的状态，你并未将这半句说出口。
t_en: Of course, this doesn't necessarily mean that she's still alive... But out of consideration for the old lady's condition, you spare her the second half of that thought.

t_ch: 老人的表情中浮现出一丝渺茫的希望，就像暴雨中海面上的一块浮木；而赫卡忒感激的目光更坚定了你让那半句话烂在肚子里的决心。
t_en: A glimmer of hope sparks up the old lady's complexion, like a piece of driftwood floating in stormy waters. Hekate's appreciative gaze further reinforces your determination in holding the second half of that thought to yourself.

t_ch: 对…你们也说了，她打算逃出来的…波瑟芬妮这孩子自小就聪明……
t_en: Yes... You also said she was planning on making an escape... Possephone has always been a smart one, ever since she was just a little girl...

t_ch: 容我再思考一番…
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 没错，我就是这么认为的。
t_en: That's right. That's what I think.

t_ch: 没错！我相信以她的能力，从那混蛋手中脱身一定不成问题。
t_en: Yes! I believe that with her capacities, she'll have no problem escaping from the clutches of that terrible man.

t_ch: 波瑟芬妮一定是因为…某些特殊的原因才至今未归……
t_en: Possephone just has her reasons... whatever they are... for why she hasn't made it back yet...

t_ch: 啊——对、对！一定是这样！一定是这样…我的波瑟芬妮还活着……
t_en: Ah... y—yeah! That's it! That's definitely it... My Possephone is still alive...

t_ch: 您放心，德墨忒尔婶婶，无论如何我都会继续寻找，把波瑟芬妮给您带回来的。
t_en: Don't worry, Aunty Demetria — I'll keep searching for her no matter what. I'll bring your Possephone back for you.

t_ch: …好…好孩子…波瑟芬妮…谢谢…我的波瑟芬妮……
t_en: ...Thank you... Good child... Possephone... My Possephone...

t_ch: 老人眼神放空，某种奇异的激动与恍惚之情于她面色中浮现。
t_en: Her eyes glaze over and a bizarre, excited, and mesmerized look falls across her face.

t_ch: 让婶婶自己静一静吧…我也需要再冷静一下。
t_en: Let Aunty Demetria cool off for a while... I personally need to cool off, too.

t_ch: 辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。这是报酬，请收好。
t_en: Great work, {NICKNAME}. Thank you so much. Here's your reward, there you go.

t_ch: 我觉得无论是波瑟芬妮，还是哈德斯，都被拉达曼算计了。
t_en: I think Rhadaman plotted against both Possephone and Hadez.

t_ch: 你们看这个无法使用的卷轴…他明显是有备而来。
t_en: Look at this useless scroll... He obviously came prepared.

t_ch: …啊…是…这样吗？
t_en: ...Er... Is... that so?

t_ch: 容我再思考一番…
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 没错，我就是这么认为的。
t_en: That's right. That's what I think.

t_ch: 不仅如此，从去年开始的「劣质物资」事件，恐怕都和他脱不开关系。
t_en: That's not all. The cases of the "dodgy supplies" that have been going on since last year are probably connected to him.

t_ch: 拉达曼？我好像听说过他……
t_en: Rhadaman? I think I've heard of him before...

t_ch: 这个人是「生命花园」的研究员，似乎还颇有些威望。
t_en: This guy's a researcher at the Garden of Life and seems to have made a bit of a name for himself.

t_ch: …我知道了，谢谢你们，这件事就交给我处理吧。
t_en: ...I see. Thank you, and please leave this matter with me.

t_ch: …波瑟芬妮…别怕…我的波瑟芬妮……
t_en: ...Possephone... Don't be afraid... My Possephone...

t_ch: 老人眼神放空，面色一派恍惚颓然，不住喃喃自语起来。
t_en: Her eyes glaze over and her face is in a daze as she mumbles to herself over and over.

t_ch: …波瑟芬妮…我的波瑟芬妮……
t_en: ...Possephone... My Possephone...

t_ch: 让婶婶自己静一静吧…我也需要再冷静一下。
t_en: Let Aunty Demetria cool off for a while... I personally need to cool off, too.

t_ch: 辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。这是报酬，请收好。
t_en: Great work, {NICKNAME}. Thank you so much. Here's your reward, there you go.

t_ch: 哎——你听说了吗，拉达曼被卫兵带走了。
t_en: Hey... Did you hear about Rhadaman getting arrested by the guards?

t_ch: 拉达曼？他不是出了名的大好人吗，这什么情况？
t_en: Rhadaman? Isn't he a bit of a celebrity do-gooder? What's going on?

t_ch: 你知道探险队物资那事儿吧，之前闹得沸沸扬扬的，听说就是他搞的鬼。
t_en: Remember all that fuss which went down about the expedition team? Well, I heard he was behind it all.

t_ch: 啊？！真的假的——
t_en: Huh!? Are you serious...?

t_ch: 我骗你干嘛，这事儿可是那位德墨忒尔亲自检举的！
t_en: Why would I lie? That's what Demetria herself reported!

t_ch: 嘶…她老人家这么大年纪了，还出面揭发，那估计没跑了。不过真没看出来啊……
t_en: Sss... If she still came forward to expose the truth despite her advanced age, I'm guessing it must be true. But I really can't see him as a bad guy...

t_ch: 或许这就叫知人知面不知心吧……
t_en: Maybe that's what people mean when they say "You think you know someone"...

t_ch: 就真是「善恶好轮回，塔兰顿饶过谁」！
t_en: "The cycle of good and evil goes on eternally, and Talanton will spare no comers!"

t_ch: 天台不愧为约会圣地，你在无意间撞见了一对正在幽会的爱侣。
t_en: The rooftop is a must-go for lovebirds, and you accidentally walk straight into a couple's secret tryst.

t_ch: 由于你那过于灵敏的听力，当你意识到应该立即撤离时，一切已经来不及了……
t_en: You're particularly sharp of hearing, so by the time you realize you should've escaped, it's already far too late...

t_ch: 宝贝，咱们这样是不是太大胆了？你父母就在下面的市场，只要一点动静，他们就会抬头，然后顺势发现我们……
t_en: My dear, isn't this too bold of us? Your parents are right down in the market — just a bit of noise, and they'll look up and spot us...

t_ch: 呵呵，那就叫他们看吧，最好是睁大眼睛看好了，他们引以为傲的宝贝女儿，与他们最不耻的悬锋小子相爱的样子，准叫他们气得当场发疯，哈哈哈！
t_en: Teehee, then let them watch as much as they want. The sight of their pride and joy, their darling daughter, falling in love with the Kremnos kid they hate the most... That ought to drive them nuts, haha!

t_ch: 我就喜欢这样的你，你坚持的事，谁也阻止不了。不过城邦间有自己的恩怨，你父母不待见我，我不怪他们。
t_en: I just love this side of you — once you've made up your mind, no one can stop you. But there are grudges between the city-states. Your parents dislike me, but I don't blame them.

t_ch: 哼，他俩都没上过战场，满脑子却只有战争留下的仇恨，对你们悬锋族人的恨。
t_en: Hmph, neither of them has ever fought in battle, but their minds both bear the scars of war — and hatred towards you and your Kremnoan brethren.

t_ch: 最后的城邦，「奥赫玛」…末日之下，这里应该是庇护所有人的家园，也包括你们。
t_en: The last city, Okhema... It ought to be a sanctuary for all in the end times, including for people like you.

t_ch: 对了，上次我说的，一起离开奥赫玛的事，你考虑好了吗？
t_en: That's right — have you given any thought to what I mentioned last time... about leaving Okhema?

t_ch: 宁芙…我们讨论过很多次了，这样太危险。等我未来有更大的成就，我们就可以……
t_en: Nympha... We've been over this a lot already. It's too dangerous. Once I earn a few more achievements in the future, then we can...

t_ch: 我的傻瓜，厄琉斯，你还不明白吗？！他们的仇恨只与你那悬锋城的血脉有关。
t_en: Silly billy, Aelius... Don't you get it!? Their hate is only for your Castrum Kremnos bloodline.

t_ch: 不失去我一次，他们是不会妥协的——
t_en: They won't compromise until they lose me at least once...

t_ch: 宁芙，等等！
t_en: Nympha, wait!

t_ch: 宁芙……
t_en: Nympha...

t_ch: 还愣着干啥，追啊！
t_en: What are you just standing there for? Go after her!

t_ch: 哎…若真是这般简单就好了……
t_en: Oh... I wish it were that simple...

t_ch: 你这个玩弄感情的渣男！
t_en: You're a scumbag for playing around with her feelings!

t_ch: 哈？你不明白我们的情况，若真是感情本身的问题就好了……
t_en: Huh? You don't know a thing about us. If only the problem were with our relationship...

t_ch: 来都来了，我就听听吧…
t_en: We're here now, so I'll just listen...

t_ch: 哎，谢谢你愿意与我分担这愁苦……
t_en: Hey, thank you for sharing all this with me...

t_ch: 其实，我的出身与宁芙的家庭相互对立…我是悬锋将领的后代，她则来自奥赫玛历史最为悠久的几个权贵家族。
t_en: Y'know, I come from a completely different class to Nympha... I'm a descendant of a Kremnos general, and she comes from one of the most powerful and long-lasting noble families in Okhema history.

t_ch: 黄金战争期间，我们两家各自代表着自己城邦的立场，在战场上相互厮杀，双方家族都有不少成员葬身于对方的刀剑下。
t_en: During the Chrysos War, our families fought against each other on the battlefield as each represented the banner of their own city. Plenty of members from both families were slain by the other city in the fighting.

t_ch: 即使黄金战争已结束这么多年，即使悬锋孤军已与奥赫玛握手言和，我的家族已随先王政权的崩塌而灭亡…可，这份仇恨从未消失……
t_en: And even though the Chrysos War has long finished, even though the Kremnoan Detachment has made peace with Okhema, and even though my family was wiped out with the fall of the old king's rule — none of this animosity has disappeared...

t_ch: 我随万敌殿下抵达奥赫玛的第一夜，就有刺客前来企图夺走我的性命，那时我还只是个懵懂的孩童。后来，万敌殿下向元老院提出抗议，他们才不情愿地收了手。
t_en: The first night I arrived in Okhema alongside Lord Mydei, an assassin made an attempt on my life. I was just a child back then... Lord Mydei lodged a complaint with the Council of Elders, and they reluctantly put a stop to things.

t_ch: 背负家族恩怨的我们，明明是这世上最不该相爱的人，却被牵起了金丝线。这一定是墨涅塔的奇迹！赞美墨涅塔！
t_en: Burdened by these familial tragedies, we are clearly the most star-crossed of lovers — and yet we are tied together by the golden thread. This must be Mnestia's marvelous miracle! Praise be to Mnestia!

t_ch: 那你们今天吵什么？
t_en: So what were you arguing about today, then?

t_ch: 怕什么，光明正大地告诉他们！
t_en: What are you so afraid of? Be up front and open with them!

t_ch: 哎，今天我们正是因此而争吵…
t_en: *sigh* That's precisely what we were arguing about today...

t_ch: 非要在我面前秀恩爱是吧?
t_en: You want to show off your love, right?

t_ch: 哎，接下来要讲烦心事了…
t_en: Huh, this next part is really annoying...

t_ch: 最近，我们私会有些频繁，宁芙的父母似乎察觉到了什么，开始派人暗中跟踪她，或是亲自陪同她一起。
t_en: We've been sneaking off a lot lately, but Nympha's parents seem to be onto us and have started sending spies to secretly tail her — or assigning a personal escort to her.

t_ch: 宁芙提出了一个我并不赞成计划：公开我们的恋情，再逃到奥赫玛城外，用舆论向他的父母施压，直到我们的婚事得到同意再返回……
t_en: Nympha proposed a plan that I don't agree with: Publicize our relationship, then flee outside Okhema and use public opinion to pressure her parents, only returning once they've agreed to our marriage...

t_ch: 好主意啊！
t_en: Great idea!

t_ch: 有其巧妙之处，只有我们被逼上如此绝路，才能显得她父母不义。不过城外的安全问题，是我最大的顾虑……
t_en: There is a certain cleverness to it. Only by forcing us into a desperate situation can her parents seem in the wrong. However, I'm most worried about our personal safety outside the city...

t_ch: 可是城外危险…
t_en: But it's dangerous outside the city...

t_ch: 哎，她说被逼上如此绝路，才能显得父母不义。但，安全问题是我最大的顾虑……
t_en: *sigh* She said that only by forcing us into a desperate situation could her parents be painted as the bad guys. However, my greatest concern is our personal safety...

t_ch: 万一她父母不在乎呢…
t_en: What if her parents don't even care...

t_ch: 这个计划倒是有其巧妙之处，只有我们被逼上如此绝路，才能显得她父母不义。不过城外的安全问题，是我最大的顾虑……
t_en: There is a certain cleverness to this plan. Only by forcing us into a desperate situation can her parents seem in the wrong. However, I'm most worried about our personal safety outside the city...

t_ch: 作为宁芙的伴侣，我的职责除了爱她，更重要的是保护她。城外到处都是游荡的怪物，以我一人之力，我很担心无法护她周全。
t_en: As Nympha's partner, my duty is to protect her rather than merely just love her. All those wandering monsters surround the city... I'm worried that I won't be able to protect her by myself.

t_ch: 万一出了事，我没办法向我自己交代……
t_en: If anything should happen to her, I'd never be able to forgive myself...

t_ch: 我会等更好的机会。我相信，如果我们是命定中的爱人，事情一定会迎来转机，墨涅塔会守护我们的！
t_en: I'll bide my time until a better chance comes along. I believe that if we are indeed destined to be lovers, then things will definitely take a turn for the better. Mnestia will surely watch over us!

t_ch: 厄琉斯！你果然在这儿，大事不妙了。
t_en: Aelius! I knew you'd be here. Something terrible has happened.

t_ch: 阿芙罗小姐，发生什么了？
t_en: Miss Aphrea, what's going on?

t_ch: 刚刚在市集…宁芙小姐被她父母派来的卫兵强行绑走了。
t_en: Just now, in the market... Miss Nympha's parents sent goons to kidnap her and carry her off.

t_ch: 也就是说…！
t_en: That means...!

t_ch: 你们的恋情，她的父母已经知道了！
t_en: Her parents already know about your affair!

t_ch: 事到如今，你打算怎么办？
t_en: It's come to this. What's your plan from here?

t_ch: 总归是要瞒不住的。
t_en: It can no longer be kept a secret.

t_ch: 没想到，他们竟然真会对自己的女儿采用强硬手段…阿芙罗小姐，你知道宁芙可能被带到哪儿了吗？
t_en: I never expected them to actually take such tough measures against their own daughter... Miss Aphrea, do you have any idea where they may have taken Nympha?

t_ch: 他们离去的时候并没有提到，我也无从猜起。
t_en: They didn't say anything when they left, so I wouldn't know where to begin.

t_ch: 宁芙的父母在奥赫玛的势力范围很广…这下麻烦了。
t_en: Nympha's parents have a very wide network of influence in Okhema... This is big trouble.

t_ch: 厄琉斯，我刚听其他店主讨论，宁芙家的卫兵，最近在云石市集的附近频繁出现。
t_en: Aelius, I just heard some shopkeepers talking about Nympha's family guards. They've often been sighted near Marmoreal Market.

t_ch: 嗯，我去问问各位朋友吧，或许能拼凑出新的线索。谢谢你了，阿芙罗小姐。
t_en: Hmm, I'll go check in with my friends, then, and maybe I'll be able to piece together a few clues. Thank you so much, Miss Aphrea.

t_ch: 异邦勇士，有何需要？
t_en: What do you need, warrior of the outlands?

t_ch: 宁芙的事，你有线索吗？
t_en: Nympha. Got any clues about her?

t_ch: 宁芙，我很抱歉。动静很大，她很难过。
t_en: Nympha, I'm so sorry. There was a lot, going on, and she was really upset.

t_ch: 奇怪的事…锁链…宁芙的管家，上周订了锁链。
t_en: There was something weird... Chains... Nympha's butler, last week, ordered some chains.

t_ch: 难道是拿来关住她的？
t_en: Perhaps they were for tying her up?

t_ch: 你们奥赫玛人玩挺大…
t_en: You Okhemans really know how to play hardball...

t_ch: 我也有种不好的预感…哈托努斯，他们有告诉你这些东西要送去哪儿吗？
t_en: I've got a bad feeling about this, too... Chartonus, did they tell you where this stuff was going?

t_ch: 上门提货，已经拿走了。很古怪，过去总送到家里。
t_en: They came by, picked it up, already gone. Really weird. In the past, always delivered things, to their house.

t_ch: 我知道了…如果她家里人再找你订了些什么，请告诉我，我的朋友。
t_en: I see... If her family puts in any more orders with you, please let me know, my friend.

t_ch: 您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
t_en: What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?

t_ch: 宁芙的事，你有线索吗？
t_en: Nympha. Got any clues about her?

t_ch: 真令人难过，当时的宁芙一点也不情愿，她是被八个卫兵抬走的。很抱歉，我们没成功拦下他们……
t_en: It's so disturbing. Nympha did not want to go at all, but was carried off by eight of their guards. I'm so sorry that we couldn't stop them...

t_ch: 让我想想…前几天，宁芙家的后厨来我这儿订了大量食材，其中有不少名贵的珍品。
t_en: Let me see... Several days back, the kitchen staff for Nympha's family placed a massive food order with me, including several expensive delicacies.

t_ch: 这种订购的阵仗，我还只在婚宴上见过…宁芙要结婚了？！
t_en: It's the kind of order that you normally only see at wedding banquets... So is Nympha getting married!?

t_ch: 一旁的厄琉斯都快站不住了，险些跪在地上，还好你扶住了他。
t_en: Standing off to one side, Aelius can barely stay on his feet. He nearly drops to his knees — but luckily you're there to catch him.

t_ch: 厄琉斯，坚持住。
t_en: Aelius, be strong.

t_ch: 她甚至没有邀请你。
t_en: She didn't even invite you.

t_ch: 原来宁芙…一直是在骗我吗…我只是来自异邦的玩物吗……
t_en: So Nympha... has been lying to me all along...? I'm just some boy toy from the outlands to her...

t_ch: 振作点！我宁可相信「黎明机器」再也不会发光，也不相信宁芙不爱你！
t_en: Pull yourself together! There's more chance of the Dawn Device never lighting up again than Nympha not loving you!

t_ch: 预定的送货时间…就是明天。两位，无论那是场什么宴会，你们一定要赶在这之前找到宁芙。
t_en: The delivery's scheduled for... tomorrow. No matter what kind of banquet it is, you two must find Nympha before it begins.

t_ch: 手绘陶罐，奇珍古玩，价格不贵，随便看随便瞧。
t_en: Hand-painted pots and ancient artifacts, all at reasonable prices. Feel free to take a look around.

t_ch: 宁芙的事，你有线索吗？
t_en: Nympha. Got any clues about her?

t_ch: 腐朽的老贵族，连儿女的幸福也要没收。铭记历史令人明智，也令悲剧轮回。
t_en: Those depraved old aristocrats are stealing even their children's happiness. Remembering history makes us wise, but also repeats the cycle of tragedy.

t_ch: 前两天，我这儿有笔十分可疑的交易——一个侍卫模样的男人，竟要出手一颗价值连城的悬锋鹰血红项链。
t_en: A few days back, I had a really suspicious trade — this guy who looked like a retainer wanting to pawn a priceless pendant made of Kremnos eagleblood.

t_ch: 鹰血红极为罕见，少有的存世珍品也多作为悬锋族人的传家宝，不会出现在普通奥赫玛守卫手上。
t_en: Eagleblood is very rare, and the rare extant treasures are mostly safeguarded by Kremnoans, so there's no way it'd be in the hands of an ordinary Okheman guard.

t_ch: 我便问了他一嘴，他只说是城中的贵族赏给他的。我拿给你看看……
t_en: When I hit him up about it, he just said some aristocrat in the city gifted it to him. Here, let me show you...

t_ch: …这？！这条是我送给宁芙的，我母亲的鹰血红项链。我害怕暴露，从不让宁芙戴在身上，她肯定好好藏在家里了。
t_en: ...This!? That's my mother's eagleblood pendant that I gave to Nympha. I was worried about us getting busted, so I never let Nympha wear it. She must have hidden it very well somewhere at home.

t_ch: 怎么会出现在这里？
t_en: What's it doing here?

t_ch: 这是宁芙的意思？
t_en: Is that what Nympha wanted?

t_ch: 有人发现了这条项链…
t_en: Someone found this pendant...

t_ch: 今天的每条线索，都指向一件事——宁芙正在被家人逼迫。
t_en: Every clue so far today points to one outcome and one alone: Nympha's family put her under duress.

t_ch: 对这样奇怪的顾客，我多留了个心眼。我的朋友说，此人最近常在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫</color>出没。
t_en: I kept a close eye on this bizarre customer. My friend said this guy has been hanging around <color=#dbc291ff>Marmoreal Palace</color> a lot lately.

t_ch: 快去吧，愿这块鹰血红带你见到你所爱之人。
t_en: Go, now! I hope this eagleblood can help lead you to the one you love.

t_ch: 这里太大了，很难找到她的去向。还是先调查下过去的记忆，寻找线索吧
t_en: It's too big here and impossible to find where she's gone. Let's go over some past memories and try to pull out some more clues.

t_ch: 你们要带我去哪儿？你真打算这样对你的女儿？
t_en: Where are you taking me? Are you really going to do this... to your own daughter?

t_ch: 你拒绝了无数出身高贵的奥赫玛青年，没想到竟是为了个悬锋族人？还非得是这个！要不是卫兵将那条项链拿给我看，我都不敢相信他所言为真。
t_en: You rejected all those high-born young Okheman boys, but I never thought you were doing that for a Kremnoan! And it had to be this one! I'd never have believed it was true if the guard hadn't shown me the necklace.

t_ch: 我的项链？你们是怎么找到的？快把它还给我！
t_en: My necklace? How did you find that? Give it back to me, now!

t_ch: 蛮横的举动，无礼的话语…你变成如今这样，是我们做父母的失职。
t_en: Such rude behavior and disrespectful language... Your current behavior is because of our failure as parents.

t_ch: 哼，确实挺失败的。要不是你们的计划败露，我还没法爱上这个险些被谋害的可怜人呢！
t_en: Hmph, you sure failed, majorly. And if your plan hadn't been exposed, I'd never have fallen in love with that poor man who was nearly killed!

t_ch: 你…！你若不珍惜自由，那我来替你安排。婚宴开始前，好好反省反省！
t_en: Why, you...! If you don't cherish your own freedom, then allow me to make some arrangements. And think about what you've done before the wedding begins, would you!

t_ch: 至于那小子，自然有他好看。
t_en: As for that little punk, he's going to suffer.

t_ch: 母亲，听好了。我向「公正之秤」，塔兰顿起誓，预言你们的未来——
t_en: Mother, listen to me. I swear by Talanton, the Scale of Justice, and I will predict your future...

t_ch: 你们的血脉将与悬锋城相融，你们的后代将流着纷争的血——
t_en: Your bloodline will merge with that of Castrum Kremnos, and your progeny will carry the blood of Strife...

t_ch: 你怎么敢说出这种恶毒的话语？！带她去房间，栓好了！
t_en: How dare you say such malicious slander!? Take her to the cell and tie her up!

t_ch: 遵…遵命，夫人。
t_en: Y—Yes, ma'am.

t_ch: 蛮不讲理的家庭！原来…宁芙一直在承受这样的高压，可她从未和我提起过丝毫。
t_en: How unreasonable her family is! So... Nympha has been putting up with such huge pressure at home, but never once let on to me about it.

t_ch: 她不想给你压力。
t_en: She never wanted to put any pressure on you.

t_ch: 这样的亲家好可怕…
t_en: In-laws like that are super scary...

t_ch: 所以她要让父母失去她一次…
t_en: So that's why she wants to make her parents lose her at least once...

t_ch: 我必须…必须为此做些什么。
t_en: I have to... I've gotta do something about this.

t_ch: 你？你是那个悬锋小子！
t_en: You? You're that Kremnos punk!

t_ch: 来人啊——
t_en: He's here!

t_ch: 受死吧——
t_en: Die...!

t_ch: 厄琉斯奋力挥出强而有力的一拳，顷刻锤倒了眼前的守卫…
t_en: Aelius throws all his might into a massive punch, instantly knocking down the guard...

t_ch: 哼，让你偷我项链。
t_en: Hmph, steal MY necklace again, why don't you?

t_ch: 这就是悬锋人的实力吗…
t_en: Is that the strength of a Kremnoan...?

t_ch: 好猛！
t_en: That was brutal!

t_ch: 你单挑泰坦眷属也没问题的。
t_en: You could solo a Titankin. no problem.

t_ch: 房间内立刻有了动静：带着锁链的脚步声急切奔向门口，很快，传来了熟悉的女声……
t_en: There's movement inside the room instantly: Footsteps dragging chains in a hurry towards the door, followed very shortly by a familiar female voice...

t_ch: 厄琉斯，是你在外面吗？
t_en: Aelius, is that you outside?

t_ch: 我的宁芙，是我来了！我还带了一位帮助我的朋友…真不好意思，我好像还不知道你的名字？
t_en: My Nympha, it is I! And I've brought a friend to help me out... I'm so sorry. I don't think I actually know your name.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}。
t_en: {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 球棒侠。
t_en: I'm Galactic Baseballer.

t_ch: 我开拓者做好事从不留名！
t_en: We Trailblazers always perform good deeds anonymously!

t_ch: 也谢谢你，这位勇士{F#小姐}{M#先生}，谢谢你保护我的厄琉斯。
t_en: Thank you so much too, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Warrior, for protecting my Aelius.

t_ch: 宁芙，你听我说，我都想好了——
t_en: Nympha, listen to me: I've thought this through very carefully...

t_ch: 我们私奔吧！我带你离开奥赫玛，现在、立刻、马上就动身！
t_en: Let's elope! Let me take you away from Okhema, right here, right now... Let's just go!

t_ch: 厄琉斯…你怎么突然一下子？
t_en: Aelius... What makes you say that all of a sudden?

t_ch: 呼——这是我第一次感觉到，若是继续向现状妥协，我可能真的会失去你。
t_en: Well... This is the first time I've ever felt that if things stay as they are, I might really end up losing you.

t_ch: 他以为你要结婚了。
t_en: He thought you were marrying someone else.

t_ch: 他以为你把他的项链卖了。
t_en: He thought you pawned his necklace.

t_ch: 他以为你把他当做玩物。
t_en: He thought you treated him like a boy toy.

t_ch: 我好像总是理所当然地认为你会属于我，我们的爱是墨涅塔的旨意，真爱之人自会受到泰坦的眷顾。
t_en: I kind of always took it for granted that you are mine, that our love was the will of Mnestia, that those truly in love would be afforded favor by the Titans.

t_ch: 时至今日，我才恍然大悟——其实牵起这条金丝的，一直都是你——你的勇敢、你的善良、你的执着……要守护这份感情，我也需要与你一同抗争。
t_en: But it's only today that I finally realized... that the one pulling on this golden thread has always been you: Your courage, your kindness, your perseverance... To protect our relationship, I also need to fight alongside you.

t_ch: 厄琉斯，你还记得我们的相遇吗？
t_en: Aelius, do you still remember how we first met?

t_ch: 我怎么会忘呢？那天，你来了我的铁匠铺，我们一见如故，一直聊到勤劳的哈托努斯都开始打哈欠。然后，我们每天都期盼见到彼此……
t_en: How could I ever forget? That day, you came to my blacksmith shop, and we hit it off like two old friends, talking up a storm until poor Chartonus was yawning. After that, we'd look forward to seeing each other every day...

t_ch: 我从来都没与你坦白过。其实，我从开始就知道父母派人谋害你的事。所以我找到了你，我想为他们的恶行向你道歉……
t_en: There's something I've never been honest with you about. I actually knew all along that my parents sent someone to try to kill you. So I wanted to reach out to you and offer up an apology for their evil...

t_ch: 只是没想到，一见面我就无可救药地爱上了你。然后你带我结识了很多异乡的朋友，看到了更广阔的世界……
t_en: But I never thought that I'd fall head over heels in love with you as soon as we met. And when you introduced me to so many outlander friends, you opened up my eyes to the bigger world outside...

t_ch: 宁芙……
t_en: Nympha...

t_ch: 仇恨就像雪球，滚过千百年，到最后已不在乎最早犯错的究竟是谁。
t_en: Hatred is like a snowball: Once it's been rolling for centuries, it doesn't matter who made the first mistake.

t_ch: 上一代的仇恨，会在我们这里终结。
t_en: Let the hatred of previous generations stop with us.

t_ch: 所以…我们必须离开。
t_en: So then... we have to go.

t_ch: 对，离开，置身险境，逼迫那些老古板低头认输。我们会凯旋，然后将这场爱情的胜利献予泰坦，但不是向墨涅塔，而是向最公正的塔兰顿。
t_en: Yes, leave — to put ourselves in danger and force those stuffy old fogeys to bow their heads in defeat. We will return triumphant, and then dedicate the victory of our love to the Titan — to fair and just Talanton, instead of Mnestia.

t_ch: 我，会随你到天涯海角，我的宁芙……
t_en: I will follow you to the ends of the earth, my darling Nympha...

t_ch: 大团圆结局！
t_en: What a happy ending!

t_ch: 我可以走了吗？
t_en: All good if I bounce?

t_ch: 好心的勇士，请留步，我还有最后一件事想拜托你。可以请你先去市集旁的<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽工坊</color>等我们吗？
t_en: Kind warrior, please stay a while. I have one final task to ask of you. Could you please go to the <color=#dbc291ff>Dromas Workshop</color> beside the market and wait for us there?

t_ch: 我们将从那里乘坐大地兽离开，但离开前，有件重要之物要托付给你……
t_en: We'll depart from there by dromas — but before we go, there's something very important I'd like to leave with you...

t_ch: 又麻烦你了，我们一会儿见。
t_en: So sorry to bother you once again. We'll see you later.

t_ch: 我们想把这组书信交给你，刚才匆忙整理好的。
t_en: We'd like to leave this set of letters with you. We've just been frantically pulling this together.

t_ch: 为了避免像我父母这样的贵族在暗处干预，我们要让奥赫玛听见我们的故事。这些往来的书信就是最好的证明，它们会为我们诉说公正与真情。
t_en: We must let Okhema hear our story to avoid pesky interference from aristocrats like my parents. These letters form our best shot at providing evidence, and they'll recount justice and love in our stead.

t_ch: 我想把它们交给见证了一切的你来保管。当合适的时机来临，请替我们公开这些信件。
t_en: I want to give them to you, as someone who witnessed everything. When the time is right, please, can you publicize these letters?

t_ch: 或者…万一我们遭遇不测，至少还能成为剧作家们创作时的灵感吧。
t_en: Or else... if anything should ever happen to us, at least let us serve as inspiration for playwrights out there.

t_ch: 话不能乱说。
t_en: Please don't joke about that.

t_ch: 呸呸呸！
t_en: Bah!

t_ch: 呼——终于可以光明正大地戴上你送我的鹰血红项链啦！不用再躲躲藏藏的感觉真好。
t_en: Whew... I can finally wear the eagleblood necklace that you gave me out in public! It feels so good not having to hide things anymore.

t_ch: 瞧把你开心的。时间不早了，趁被发现前，我们要赶紧上路了。
t_en: Just look how happy you are... It's getting late. We have to hit the road now before we're discovered.

t_ch: 那我们先告辞啦，希望未来可以再相见！
t_en: We'd better say goodbye, now. Hope to see you again sometime in the future!

t_ch: 一定可以的。
t_en: For sure.

t_ch: 在外面注意安全。
t_en: You stay safe out there.

t_ch: 要多消灭点怪物哈。
t_en: Keep slaying those monsters, okay.

t_ch: 我会保护好她的。毕竟，现在才是一切幸福的开始……
t_en: I will keep her safe. After all, now is just the beginning of our happiness together...

t_ch: 先去问问铁匠铺的哈托努斯吧，兴许宁芙向他提起过什么。
t_en: Go and ask Chartonus at the blacksmith shop. Maybe Nympha mentioned something to him before.

t_ch: 再去问问餐厅老板克瑞斯，市集上的事他都很清楚。
t_en: Then, try asking the restaurant owner Kyros. He knows all about what goes on in the market.

t_ch: 再去问问古玩店的西塔罗斯吧，看看能否从交易中获取些线索。
t_en: Lastly, try asking Theodoros in the ancient artifacts store. Maybe there will be a clue or two in their recent transactions.

t_ch: 没想到去了云石天宫。宁芙，等着我。
t_en: Who would have thought she'd be at Marmoreal Palace. Nympha, wait for me.

t_ch: 哼，你以为能办到吗？这云石天宫四下都是人，总有人会为我通风报信的。
t_en: Hmph, you think that's possible? There are people all over Marmoreal Palace. Someone will help me pass messages.

t_ch: 天真的孩子。我说的是<color=#dbc291ff>市集</color>那间房，最危险的地方就是最安全的。
t_en: Naïve child. I am talking about that room in the <color=#dbc291ff>market</color>. The most dangerous place is also the safest.

t_ch: 走，我们回市集，掘地三尺我要找到她。
t_en: Come, let's go back to the market. I will tear this place apart to find her.

t_ch: 忽然，一阵急促的脚步声接近，将你从这段齁甜的对话中拯救了出来。
t_en: Suddenly, a wave of hurried footsteps comes rushing towards you, rescuing you from this sickly sweet conversation.

t_ch: 多好的天气啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}，请问你打算听几个重磅新闻？
t_en: What a great day, {F#miss}{M#mister}. How many breaking news alerts do you plan on listening to?

t_ch: 你这都是哪听来的野史？
t_en: Where did you hear about these wild rumors?

t_ch: 野史？只要还有一个人没听过，那就是新闻！
t_en: Wild rumors? So long as there's one person who hasn't heard of something, it's all news!

t_ch: 都用传信石版了，还卖报纸？
t_en: We all use teleslates nowadays. What are you talking about newspapers for?

t_ch: 谁说这是报纸了？纸多费钱啊——我这新闻，每个字都是靠嘴说出来的~
t_en: Who said I'm talking about a newspaper? Paper's too expensive — every line of this news is personally delivered by my mouth~

t_ch: 我也有不少新闻，开价吧。
t_en: I've got plenty of news myself, too. Name your price.

t_ch: 喂喂，别搞错——我只售卖新闻，不回收新闻。
t_en: Hey, don't get me wrong now — I only sell news. I'm not into recycling it.

t_ch: 现在正值开业大减价，一条新闻只要5利衡币，听吗听吗？
t_en: We're having a sale to mark the grand opening: One line of news for just 5 Balance Coins. Want to hear one?

t_ch: 女孩楚楚可怜地看着你，一副「卖不掉故事今天就要饿肚子」的模样。
t_en: The girl looks at you with puppy dog eyes that seem to say "I'll starve if I don't sell any news stories today."

t_ch: 听。
t_en: Okay.

t_ch: 听！
t_en: Yes!
Alright!
Let's go!!!

t_ch: 难道我没有拒绝的选项吗？
t_en: Don't tell me there's no option to refuse?

t_ch: 没错，真的有人能拒绝一个楚楚可怜的小姑娘吗？何况你是如此富有，十个故事也负担得起。
t_en: That's right, could anyone ever hope to refuse that girl with those puppy dog eyes? Besides, you're so rich now that you can afford the price of ten news items.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，多谢惠顾，那我要开始讲了……
t_en: Tee-hee, thank you so much. Well then, I'll begin...

t_ch: 女孩讲了许多离谱的故事，比如尼卡多利曾经爱上塔兰顿、和吉奥里亚互为情敌…也不知道是从哪听来的。
t_en: The girl tells a series of outrageous stories, such as Nikador falling in love with Talanton and fighting Georios in a love triangle... Who knows where she got all those from.

t_ch: 这样的故事持续了至少十分钟。或许是奥赫玛的阳光让你没有睡好，你渐渐闭上了眼……
t_en: The story lasts at least ten minutes. Perhaps the light in Okhema has been impacting your sleep, but you gradually close your eyelids...

t_ch: 等醒来时，你感觉身体似乎变轻了许多，难道跟孩子打交道真的可以释放压力？
t_en: You wake up feeling as though your body is lighter. Can spending time with children really help you take a load off?

t_ch: 过了一会，你才意识到原因……
t_en: It takes a while before you fully understand why...

t_ch: 你的钱袋——为了和本地人打成一片，你特意兑换了一些实体的利衡币——已经不翼而飞了。
t_en: Your money pouch — you exchanged some physical Balance Coins to try to fit in with the locals — has vanished.

t_ch: 哎呀，年轻人。要来看看今天新采的水果吗？
t_en: Hey there, youngster. Wanna see today's fresh fruit?

t_ch: 有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
t_en: Did you see a child running this way?

t_ch: 啊，那孩子…嗯，我确实有看到。可惜我眼花，没太看清她的去向。
t_en: Ah, that kid... Mmm, I sure did. Unfortunately, my eyesight is no longer the best, so I couldn't really make out which direction she was going in.

t_ch: 听说她是跟着一群外邦人来到奥赫玛的，父母都在途中走散了…「走散」是委婉的说法。
t_en: I heard she came to Okhema with a bunch of outlanders, and her parents got "separated" from her along the way... And I'm speaking a euphemism, you understand.

t_ch: 如果要找她的话，不妨把目光抬高一些。我只能说这么多了。
t_en: If you want to find her, you might as well set your sights higher. That's all I can say.

t_ch: 你好呀，这位客人——欢迎光临金织裁缝铺，请问有什么需要的吗？
t_en: Hey, there! Welcome to Goldweaver tailor! What can I help you with today?

t_ch: 有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
t_en: Did you see a child running this way?

t_ch: 一个孩子？是的，我看见她刚才气喘吁吁地爬楼梯来着。虽然不知道叫什么名字，但我对她还算眼熟。
t_en: A child? Yes, I saw her puffing hard as she sprinted upstairs. I don't know her name, but I've seen her around a lot.

t_ch: 那孩子每天都忙忙碌碌的，想必是经历过许多事才变得如此持家。如果能帮到她就好了……
t_en: That kid's always beavering away at something. She must've been through a lot if she's running household affairs so well. I wish there was a way I could help her...

t_ch: 您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
t_en: What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?

t_ch: 有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
t_en: Did you see a child running this way?

t_ch: 一个孩子…哦，你是说希瑞雅！那丫头，总是偷吃客人剩下的饭，我印象可深了。
t_en: A child... Oh, you must mean Serena! That girl is always stealing leftovers off the table. She makes quite an impression.

t_ch: 我原本还打算请她吃点好的来着，结果她却说躺着吃东西容易积食……
t_en: I was going to treat her to something delicious, but she told me she'd get indigestion if she ate while lying down...

t_ch: 咳，扯远了。对，没错，我看见她往城门的方向跑来着，鬼鬼祟祟的，不知道要干什么。
t_en: Ahem, but that's getting off track now. Yes, I saw her running towards the city gate and being sneaky about it. I'm not sure what she was up to.

t_ch: 嘿，朋友。来找翻飞自如的好宝贝？你可是来对地方了。
t_en: G'day, friend. Looking for some good stuff that floats in a whimsy? You've come to the right place.

t_ch: 有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
t_en: Did you see a child running this way?

t_ch: 一个孩子？也许看到了，也许没有，我的记性总是不好…或许几枚利衡币能让我想起来？
t_en: A child? Maybe, maybe not. My memory ain't what it used to be... But maybe a few Balance Coins will get it working again?

t_ch: 掏出球棒。
t_en: Pull out the baseball bat.

t_ch: 哎哎哎，冷静！我只是开个玩笑，何必拿出吉奥里亚的神杵来对付我呢。
t_en: Hey hey hey, chill out! I was just kidding around, no need to bash me around with Georios' scepter.

t_ch: 掏出炎枪。
t_en: Pull out the flaming lance.

t_ch: 哎哎哎，冷静！我只是开个玩笑，何必拿出尼卡多利的兵器来对付我呢。
t_en: Hey hey hey, chill out! I was just kidding around, no need to rough me up with Nikador's weapon.

t_ch: 掏出帽子。
t_en: Pull out the hat.

t_ch: 哎哎哎，冷静！我只是开个玩笑，何必拿出法吉娜的冠冕来对付我呢。
t_en: Hey hey hey, chill out! I was just kidding around, no need to use Phagousa's crown against me.

t_ch: 咳咳…我是看见了那孩子，而且我很清楚她一直以来追求的东西。
t_en: Ahem... I saw that kid, and I also know exactly what she's looking for all this time.

t_ch: 她的藏身处就在右边高台上，去找吧，她把所有财宝都放在那里了。
t_en: She's hiding up high on a platform to the right. Go take a look. That's where she stashes all her precious stuff.

t_ch: 竹筐里摆着几块劣质宝石、一盏拼贴起来的碎陶器、以及其它各种零碎…又多又杂，像是鸟儿拾来筑巢的枝条。
t_en: Inside the bamboo basket lies a few cheap gemstones, a pieced-together porcelain vase, and various other loose items... So many things, all mixed together, like birds building up a nest.

t_ch: 这些东西大都值点钱，但不多，勉强能买下一面盾牌与一根长矛。容器的主人似乎只想把它们储存起来，而且已经这样坚持了好些日子。
t_en: Most things are worth at least a little money, but not much — barely enough to buy a shield and spear. Their owner seems only interested in collecting things — and has clearly been doing so for some time.

t_ch: 先生，你知道我的爸爸妈妈去哪了吗？我从那天起就没再见过他们了。
t_en: Mister, do you know where my mom and dad are? I haven't seen them since that day.

t_ch: 听说你一直在城门前站岗，认识许许多多的人。你一定知道他们去哪了，对吧？
t_en: I heard you've been standing sentry at the city gates and know pretty much everyone. You must know where they went then, right?

t_ch: 他们…应该是去了很远的地方。
t_en: They... have probably headed off somewhere very far away.

t_ch: 有多远？难道他们背着我偷偷回故乡了吗？我要去找他们！
t_en: How far? Don't tell me they went back to our hometown without telling me? I wanna find them!

t_ch: 这…恐怕办不到。奥赫玛外面是很危险的。
t_en: I... don't think you'll be able to. It's really dangerous outside Okhema.

t_ch: 我不怕危险，我要爸爸妈妈。我已经和叔叔阿姨们在外面走过一遍了，再走一遍也没关系！
t_en: I'm not afraid of danger. I just want my mom and dad. I've been out for a walk outside the city before with the grown-ups, so if I go out again, I'll be fine!

t_ch: 唉…阿卡索斯人，真是和大地兽一样犟……
t_en: *sigh* ...The Icatusians are as stubborn as a pack of dromases...

t_ch: 就算你不怕危险，也得先做好准备再启程。你也不希望半途而废吧？
t_en: You might not be afraid of anything, but you still need to get yourself ready before you head out again. You don't want to give up halfway, do you?

t_ch: 准备？什么样的准备？
t_en: Get ready? What do you mean by that?

t_ch: 嗯…比方说好多好多钱。有了钱才能买装备、买物资，最好再租几头大地兽，雇一群仆人。
t_en: Hmm... like lots and lots of money. You'll need money to buy equipment and supplies, and you should probably hire a few dromases plus a group of attendants.

t_ch: 那…之后呢？
t_en: Oh... Then what?

t_ch: 这就够你操心的了。你知道赚钱不是件容易事吧？
t_en: You worry about all that stuff first. You know it's not easy earning money, right?

t_ch: 我、我明白了。我会努力攒钱，直到能去找他们的那天……
t_en: I—I understand. I'll do my best to save money until I've got enough to go find them...

t_ch: 在你聚精会神地观看记忆片段时，一阵脚步声从身后传来……
t_en: As you watch the memory fragments intently, the sound of footsteps rings out behind you...

t_ch: …你好？
t_en: ...Hello?

t_ch: 可算抓到你了！
t_en: I finally got you!

t_ch: 今天的风儿好喧嚣啊。
t_en: The wind sure is noisy today.

t_ch: …扎格列斯爷爷，我最后一次向你祈祷——请赐我一双飞毛腿吧！
t_en: ...Granddad Zagreus, I pray to you one last time: Please make my legs lightning fast!

t_ch: 哈…我、我跑不动了……
t_en: Ha... I—I can't move...

t_ch: 就这？我才刚做完热身运动。
t_en: Is that it? I only just finished warming up.

t_ch: 把钱袋给我！
t_en: Give me my money pouch!

t_ch: 你爸妈呢？也不管管…
t_en: Where are your parents? Do they not discipline you...?

t_ch: 女孩沉默不语，这让你确定了那段记忆的真实性。
t_en: The girl stays silent, confirming the veracity of that memory.

t_ch: 她将怀里的东西抛向你——是你丢失的钱袋，里面一分都没少。
t_en: She throws the thing she's holding in her arms at you — your lost money pouch. Not a single penny is missing.

t_ch: 我从地上捡的，本想还给你来着…好吧，我承认一开始其实没想还。
t_en: I found this on the ground and wanted to return it to you... Fine, I admit that I didn't want to give it back to you at first.

t_ch: 但现在已经无所谓了。攒的钱再多，又有什么意义呢……
t_en: But that doesn't matter now. No matter how much money I can save, there's no point...

t_ch: 利波都跟我说了…阿卡索斯早就不存在了！我的爸爸妈妈也……
t_en: Lipos told me... Icatus has all gone! And my mom and dad...

t_ch: 吟游诗人从来不说谎。我再也回不到家乡，再也见不到爸爸妈妈了……
t_en: A bard never lies. I'll never be able to go back to my hometown... and I'll never see mom and dad again...

t_ch: 女孩小声啜泣起来。阿卡索斯——这听名字就知道凶多吉少的城邦已经从大地上消失了，与一个孩子的期盼一同埋葬。
t_en: The girl begins to sob quietly. Icatus — Just from the name the city, you guess it is a place of ill omens. That place has been wiped from the face of the earth and buried alongside a child's hopes.

t_ch: 女孩偏过头，看向下方的集市。很难说她是否想要投身其中。
t_en: The girl tilts her head to one side and looks down at the market. It's hard to tell whether she wants to join in.

t_ch: 现在…我又能做些什么呢？我又该做点什么呢？
t_en: So now... what can I do? What should I do?

t_ch: 去找卫兵自首吧。
t_en: Go turn yourself in to the guards.

t_ch: 去找卫兵自首吧，为你过去的行为付出代价，相信他们不会为难你的。
t_en: Go and turn yourself in to the guards, and pay the price for your previous actions. I don't think they'll take it too hard on you.

t_ch: 去博览群书吧。
t_en: Go read a ton of books.

t_ch: 去多看看书吧。你脑瓜灵光，又会算数。只要多学点知识，将来应该能养活自己。
t_en: Go and read a whole stack of books. You have a curious and bright mind and are handy with numbers. Learn enough so that you'll be able to feed yourself in the future.

t_ch: 去学习乐律吧。
t_en: Go learn some music theory.

t_ch: 去学一门乐器吧。你懂那么多野史，要是会一门乐器，应该能成为不错的吟游诗人。
t_en: Go and learn a musical instrument. You know so many rumors and tales. If you learned to play an instrument I'm sure you'd make a fantastic bard.

t_ch: 去学一门手艺吧。
t_en: Go learn a craft.

t_ch: 去学一门手艺吧，比方说织布。就算不擅长这个，只要肯用功，至少自食其力没什么问题。
t_en: Go and learn a craft such as weaving. Even if you're no good at it, you'll still be able to support yourself so long as you work hard at it.

t_ch: 嗯…知道了，我试一试吧……
t_en: Hmm... I understand. I'll give it a try...

t_ch: 女孩缓缓朝着楼下走去，步伐蹒跚，但始终没有倒下。
t_en: The girl walks down slowly, her steps stilted, yet never quite toppling over.

t_ch: 是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
t_en: Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}...

t_ch: 我现在正在改过自新，达利安大叔叔负责监督我。有时他会为我做些吃的…味道很好，总算不用捡剩饭吃了。
t_en: I've been reinventing myself, and Uncle Dorian has been looking after me. Sometimes he even makes me something to eat... It's really yum, and I don't have to go out foraging for leftovers.

t_ch: 长大以后，我也去当个卫兵吧……
t_en: When I grow up, I'm gonna be a guard...

t_ch: 是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}！我现在正在跟克帖西芬姐姐学习认字。
t_en: Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I'm learning how to read with Miss Ctesiphona.

t_ch: 虽然我基础差，总是把字写得歪歪扭扭，但克帖西芬姐姐说我很聪明，只要几个光历年就能比得上大人了。
t_en: I've got a really poor foundation and I'm always mucking up my handwriting, but Miss Ctesiphona tells me I'm very clever, and I'll catch up to an adult's level in a couple of Light Calendar years.

t_ch: 长大以后，我要不要也开个书店呢？但学者似乎更受尊敬……
t_en: Should I open up a bookstore when I grow up? But I think academics command a little more respect...

t_ch: 是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}！我现在正在跟弥斯姐姐学习演奏水漫琴。
t_en: Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I'm learning how to play the water lyre with Miss Misia.

t_ch: 我的指法不怎么样，但唱得挺好听。弥斯姐姐建议我只学简单的旋律伴奏，把精力放在演唱上。
t_en: My technique isn't great, but I can sing pretty well. Miss Misia wants me to focus on just learning simple accompanying melodies, and focus more on singing and performing.

t_ch: 长大以后，我要不要当个歌手呢？吟游诗人似乎也不错……
t_en: Should I become a singer when I grow up? Being a bard seems pretty cool, too...

t_ch: 是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}！我现在正在跟阿芙罗姐姐学习缝纫。
t_en: Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I'm learning how to sew from Miss Aphrea.

t_ch: 我不是很擅长这个，经常会戳到手指。好在阿芙罗姐姐总是耐心教导我，她真是人美心善！
t_en: I'm not very good at this at all, and I'm always stabbing myself in the finger. Luckily, Miss Aphrea is a really patient teacher. She's such a beautiful, kind-hearted person!

t_ch: 长大以后，我要不要也当个裁缝呢？肯定达不到阿格莱雅大人的水平就是了……
t_en: Should I become a tailor when I grow up? I'll never be as good as Lady Aglaea though...

t_ch: 重磅新闻！都来听啊！
t_en: Breaking news! Gather around and listen up!

t_ch: 尼卡多利卷土重来！
t_en: Nikador is staging a comeback!

t_ch: 黄金裔成员又添一人！
t_en: Another member has been added to the Chrysos Heirs!

t_ch: …得找那孩子问清楚。或许附近有人看清她逃跑的方向了？
t_en: ...I have to find and interrogate that kid. Maybe someone around here saw where she ran off to?

t_ch: 这里应该就是那孩子的藏身处，她似乎还没回来？
t_en: This must be her hiding place. I guess she hasn't made it back here, yet?

t_ch: 逃跑我还没输过！
t_en: I have never failed to escape before!

t_ch: 才不会被你抓住！
t_en: There is no way you could catch me!

t_ch: 不过，就算被抓住了…
t_en: But even if I did get caught...

t_ch: …似乎也无所谓？
t_en: ...It doesn't really matter, does it?

t_ch: 用木箱和其他容器简单围成的小家，希瑞雅长久以来的藏身处。
t_en: A small, simple home made out of wooden crates and other containers. This has been Serena's hiding place for a long time.

t_ch: 那些来路不正的财物已被尽数归还——她攒了很久，但若要奔向新的人生，这是必要步骤。
t_en: Her ill-gotten funds have all been returned... She saved for a long time, but if she wants to be able to start a new life, this is a step that she must take.

t_ch: 听说那孩子藏在<color=#dbc291ff>对面的高台上</color>，我可以从屋顶绕过去。
t_en: I hear that kid is hiding on the <color=#dbc291ff>platform opposite</color>. I can go around the roof to get there.

t_ch: 您…我认得您。您是那个最近总是和黄金裔一起行动的异邦贵客！
t_en: You... I recognize you. You're that outlander who's always seen with the Chrysos Heir!

t_ch: 是我。
t_en: It's me.

t_ch: 太好了，您来了我可就有指望了。
t_en: Great, now that you're here, maybe there's hope for me.

t_ch: 咋，你有事？
t_en: What's up? Do you need something?

t_ch: 不好意思，你认错人了。
t_en: Sorry, you've got the wrong person.

t_ch: …大家都说您喜欢开玩笑，看来是真的。
t_en: Everyone says you have a playful sense of humor, and it seems they're right.

t_ch: 是这样…我是奥赫玛推理协会的一名成员，听闻树庭在黑潮中惨遭毁灭的消息，就立刻前来调查。
t_en: Here's the thing... I'm a member of the Okhema Deduction Society. I rushed here to investigate upon hearing about the Grove's destruction by the black tide.

t_ch: 只是，没想到黑潮造物仍在附近徘徊…我只是一个业余冒险家，没有您和黄金裔那样的力量，凭我自己根本没办法深入调查任何事情。
t_en: However, I didn't expect the black tide's remnants to still be lingering nearby... I'm just an amateur adventurer and lack the kind of power you and the Chrysos Heir have to thoroughly investigate this.

t_ch: 所以……
t_en: So...

t_ch: 你想找我帮忙，调查线索。
t_en: You want my help to investigate the clues, don't you?

t_ch: 啊，没错没错！这么说您同意了？
t_en: Ah, exactly! Does that mean you'll help?

t_ch: 奥赫玛什么时候有推理协会了？
t_en: Since when did Okhema have a Deduction Society?

t_ch: 嗯…您完全没听说过也正常。因为协会里加上我总共也只有四个人。
t_en: Well, it's not surprising you haven't heard of it. There are only four of us, including me.

t_ch: 所以…我希望您能伸出援手……
t_en: So... I'm hoping you can help...

t_ch: 我想调查的是几位在黑潮里失踪的朋友，他们分别是「莲食学派」的科洛埃、「绳结学派」的尼科马库斯、还有「敬拜学派」的安德烈亚斯。
t_en: I wish to inquire about some friends of mine who were lost in the black tide. They are Clio from the Lotophagists, Nicomachus from the Nodists, and Andreas from the Venerationists.

t_ch: 我能帮上什么？
t_en: How can I help?

t_ch: 这些人我一个都不认识。
t_en: I don't know any of these people.

t_ch: 我听奥赫玛的人们说，您能使用欧洛尼斯的神力……
t_en: I heard the people of Okhema say that you can use Oronyx's divine power...

t_ch: 碰见您的时候，我就灵机一动：或许您拿着这几样东西去树庭里转一转，就能通过某种方式知道他们几个的下落了。
t_en: I had an idea when I saw you — Maybe you can somehow sense what happened to them if you go take a walk in the Grove with these things on you.

t_ch: 好吧，我试试看。
t_en: Alright, I'll give it a shot.

t_ch: 太感谢了！我就在这里等着…您要是找不到线索也没关系，本来就是非分之请，我不会怪您的！
t_en: Thank you! I'll wait here... It's all right. Even if you don't find any clues, this is an unexpected favor, and I won't blame you for it!

t_ch: 我可保证不了能做到什么。
t_en: I can't promise anything.

t_ch: 没关系，您要是找不到线索也没关系，本来就是非分之请，我不会怪您的！
t_en: It's all right. Even if you don't find any clues, this is an unexpected favor, and I won't blame you for it!

t_ch: 看来，这就是实际发生的情况：黑潮无情地从普通人身上碾过，不留下一丝怜悯。
t_en: It looks like this is exactly what happened: The black tide swept through, crushing most people without a shred of mercy.

t_ch: 但…刚才看到的这一连串情景，却似乎揭露出了某个奇怪的细节——
t_en: But... the scenes I just witnessed seem to highlight some odd details—

t_ch: 树庭同样有驻守的黄金裔，在黑潮来袭时不该如此不堪一击，还有那个黑衣剑士的行为…仔细想来确有些蹊跷。
t_en: There was a Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, they shouldn't have fallen so easily to the black tide. And that black-clad swordmaster's actions... they seem rather suspicious upon reflection.

t_ch: （信息都收集完了，先回去和珀里法斯讨论下吧。）
t_en: (All information gathered. Time to head back and discuss with Periphas.)

t_ch: 怎么样？您…这是发现了什么吗？
t_en: How did it go? Did you... find anything?

t_ch: 这…果然……
t_en: This... just as I feared...

t_ch: …节哀顺变。
t_en: ...I'm sorry for your loss.

t_ch: 抱歉要告诉你这个坏消息。
t_en: I hate to be the bearer of bad news.

t_ch: 没关系，这个结果…我早有心理准备。对普通人来说，很难有谁能从黑潮的包围中全身而退。
t_en: It's alright. I was prepared for this outcome. For most people, escaping the grasp of the black tide unscathed is nearly impossible.

t_ch: 不过，稳妥起见，我还是希望您能详细地为我描述一下…发现这些遗物的地点…还有具体的情景。
t_en: To be sure, could you describe in detail the locations where these relics were found and the specific events you witnessed?

t_ch: 你将自己刚才目睹的记忆场景转述给了珀里法斯。
t_en: You relayed the scenes from your memories to Periphas.

t_ch: …唉。在最后的时刻，尼科马库斯绝望地和怪物搏斗、安德烈亚斯祈求泰坦的神迹——而被他们尽全力保护的科洛埃小姐，也终究……
t_en: ...Alas. In their final stand, Nicomachus desperately clashed with the creature, Andreas called out for a Titan's miracle, and Miss Clio, despite their valiant efforts to shield her...

t_ch: …咦？等等。在你刚才提供的信息中，那个妄图盗取火种的神秘剑士，他看起来毫无怜悯，径直前往了供奉火种的王座——是这样没错吧？
t_en: ...What? Hold on. From what you just told me, that enigmatic swordmaster who tried to steal the Coreflame seemed ruthless, marching straight toward the Throne where the Coreflame is enshrined — Did I get that right?

t_ch: 看起来是这样。
t_en: It seems so.

t_ch: 我不确定…但这种可能性很高。
t_en: I'm not sure... but it seems highly likely.

t_ch: 他…难道不是第一次来树庭？
t_en: He's been to the Grove before, hasn't he?

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 我也有这种感觉。
t_en: I have that feeling too.

t_ch: 看来，不是只有我觉得他的行动包含疑点。
t_en: It seems I'm not alone in finding his actions dubious.

t_ch: 如果这人之前从未来过树庭，我不相信这里错综复杂的结构没有让他产生困惑。
t_en: If he had never visited the Grove before, I find it hard to believe he wouldn't be baffled by its intricate layout.

t_ch: 至少第一次过来参观的时候，即使有尼科马库斯带路，我还是因为找厕所而迷失了方向…安德烈亚斯也抱怨过自己是个路痴，在树庭工作了好几年仍然会迷路。
t_en: Even when Nicomachus guided me on my first visit, I got lost looking for the restroom... And Andreas, who always complained about being directionally challenged, still got lost in the Grove despite working there for years.

t_ch: 从你收集到的线索来看，要是将那个神秘人的行为与一个抢劫犯类比…说他事先没有踩过点，我不太相信。
t_en: From the clues you've gathered, comparing that mysterious person's actions to those of a robber... I find it hard to believe he hadn't scoped out the place beforehand.

t_ch: 可问题是…黑潮怪物真有如此智慧吗？为何他能轻易避开树庭的防备，直抵核心？
t_en: But the question is... does the black tide possess such intelligence? How did he manage to slip past the Grove's defenses and head straight for the core?

t_ch: 他有遮蔽气息的能力？
t_en: Does he have the ability to conceal his presence?

t_ch: 这也太可怕了…如果真是这样，或许奥赫玛的防守，其实也形同虚设？
t_en: That's horrifying... If that's the case, are Okhema's defenses just for show?

t_ch: 不，这反而说明，他没有这么厉害。如果真是这样，其余火种早就被盗走了。
t_en: No, that suggests he isn't all that powerful. If he were, the other Coreflames would have been stolen long ago.

t_ch: 或许他开了自动导航？
t_en: Perhaps he used navigation?

t_ch: 呃…这是个玩笑吗？抱歉，我现在很难笑得出来。
t_en: Uh... was that a joke? Sorry, I'm not really in the mood to laugh right now.

t_ch: 难道有内鬼？
t_en: Could there be an insider involved?

t_ch: 可恶，情报还是太少了。这里绝对有问题…但缺乏决定性的证据，就很难做出有效的推理。
t_en: We're still short on info. There's something wrong here... but without conclusive evidence, it's hard to make a solid deduction.

t_ch: 无论如何，这人一定以某种形式事先了解过树庭的情况，他的行为方式根本不像一个莽撞的抢劫犯，反而像是个对一切了如指掌的刺客。
t_en: Regardless, this individual must have scouted out the Grove beforehand. His methodical approach doesn't scream of a careless burglar, but rather hints at a calculated assassin who's thoroughly in the know.

t_ch: 科洛埃、尼科马库斯、安德烈亚斯…树庭的大家…愿你们在塞纳托斯的怀抱中安眠。
t_en: Clio, Nicomachus, Andreas... everyone at the Grove... may you rest in the embrace of Thanatos.

t_ch: 至于我们，外邦人——未知的威胁愈发迫近，时刻保持警惕吧。
t_en: As for us, the outlanders — the unknown threat is getting closer. Let's stay vigilant at all times.

t_ch: …防守都被攻破了？怎么回事？！只有黑潮怪物的话，我们明明能撑更久……
t_en: ...The defenses were breached? What happened!? If it were just the black tide, we could have lasted longer...

t_ch: 那个黑衣剑士…就跟在后面，击溃了所有还在抵抗的人……
t_en: The black-clad swordmaster followed closely, overwhelming all those who still dared to resist.

t_ch: 他不是失去理性的怪物，是专程来摧毁树庭的！
t_en: He's not just a mindless beast. He was on a mission to obliterate the Grove!

t_ch: 看得出，这里是一个便于防守的地形——如果在两侧布置一些天外世界的激光炮，或许就能达到「一夫当关，万夫莫开」的效果。
t_en: This terrain's a natural choke point. Set up some laser cannons from the world beyond the sky on both sides, and we'd have an impenetrable defensive position.

t_ch: 只可惜这里既没有什么好用的防御设施，黑潮的推进方式也远非普通军事力量可比。
t_en: Unfortunately, there are no useful defensive facilities here, and the black tide's method of advance is far beyond what ordinary military forces can handle.

t_ch: 牺牲者能做的，不过是用舍生的搏斗拖延极其有限的时间。
t_en: The only thing that the martyred can do is to use their lives in desperate combat to delay for a very limited time.

t_ch: 在绝望的洪水淹过人们的脖颈之前，屋顶是他们唯一的希望所在。
t_en: Before the flood of despair submerges people up to their necks, the roof is their only hope.

t_ch: 人们会在这里向心中的神明祈祷，像救命稻草一般相信着「信仰之跃」真实存在。
t_en: People pray to their gods here, believing in the 'Leap of Faith' as if it were a lifeline, hoping that it truly exists.

t_ch: 残酷的是…即便再坚定的信仰，也注定无法跨越所谓「此在」本身的极限。
t_en: The cruel part is... even the most unwavering faith cannot overcome the limits of "this existence" itself.

t_ch: 据说，捉迷藏对一切智慧生命而言都是最古老的游戏。猎人需要隐藏自己接近猎物，猎物也需要隐藏自己躲避敌人。
t_en: It is said that hide-and-seek is the oldest game for all intelligent life. The hunter needs to hide to approach the prey, and the prey also needs to hide to avoid the enemy.

t_ch: ——不过，在被黑潮摧毁的区域进行这种思考，似乎过于冷血。牺牲者曾经经历了怎样的惴惴不安与绝望…不堪细想。
t_en: — But thinking about such things in an area destroyed by the black tide seems too cold-blooded. What kind of unease and despair did the deceased go through... it's hard to imagine.

t_ch: 好久不见，没想到竟在这里遇到你。
t_en: Long time no see. Didn't expect to run into you here.

t_ch: 这不是巧了！
t_en: What a coincidence!

t_ch: 你怎么在这？
t_en: What are you doing here?

t_ch: 你是谁来着？
t_en: Who are you again?

t_ch: 我曾雇佣你出城调查，寻找德墨忒尔婶婶女儿的线索。
t_en: I once hired you to leave the city to investigate, looking for clues about Aunt Demetria's daughter.

t_ch: …我受那位「金织」女士所托，带队来处理一些事务。
t_en: ...I was entrusted by that Lady "Goldweaver" to lead the team here to handle some matters.

t_ch: 但兹事体大，之后还请不要随意外传。
t_en: But this matter is quite serious, so please don't spread this information casually.

t_ch: 你来这里是有什么事情吗？如果需要，我可以提供一些帮助。
t_en: Do you have something to do here? If you need help, I can offer some assistance.

t_ch: 就是帮旁边那位跑个腿。
t_en: Just running an errand for the people beside me.

t_ch: 问题不大，已经解决了。
t_en: No problem, it's already been solved.

t_ch: 那就好…我知道你实力强悍，但眼下树庭黑潮未消，依旧万分凶险。
t_en: That's good... I know you're strong, but right now the black tide hasn't dissipated, and it's still extremely dangerous.

t_ch: 如果没有其他事情，还是早些回奥赫玛吧。
t_en: If there's nothing else, you'd better return to Okhema soon.

t_ch: 至于旁边那个赖着不走的家伙，交给我就好。
t_en: As for that person who refuses to leave, leave him to me.

t_ch: 等这边的事情处理完毕，我们会将他一同带回去。
t_en: Once this is handled, we'll bring him back with us.

t_ch: 所以，你打算怎么办？
t_en: So, what are you going to do?

t_ch: 我会尽量和{RUBY_B#比如旁边那位}其他有识之士{RUBY_E#}一起行动，保持团结…「逝者只能停下脚步，但生者还必须前行。」
t_en: I'll try to act with {RUBY_B#the person beside me}other smart souls{RUBY_E#} and stay united... "The dead can only stop, but the living must move forward."

t_ch: 没事，有我罩着你。
t_en: It's alright. I've got your back.

t_ch: …谢谢。你不在这里的时候，我也会尽量和{RUBY_B#比如旁边那位}其他有识之士{RUBY_E#}一起行动。「逝者只能停下脚步，但生者还必须前行。」
t_en: ...Thank you. When you're not here, I'll try to act with {RUBY_B#the person beside me}other smart souls{RUBY_E#}... "The dead can only stop, but the living must move forward."

t_ch: 将奥赫玛推理协会三位成员的遗物交给珀里法斯
t_en: Hand over the belongings of the three members of the Okhema Deduction Society to Periphas

t_ch: 唔…
t_en: Argh...

t_ch: …防守都被攻破了？怎么回事？！
t_en: ...The defenses were breached? What happened!?

t_ch: 那个黑衣剑士…
t_en: That black-robed swordmaster?

t_ch: 我就在这里等着…您要是找不到线索也没关系，本来就是非分之请，我不会怪您的！
t_en: I'll wait here... It's all right. Even if you don't find any clues, this is an unexpected favor, and I won't blame you for it!

t_ch: 已经又搜索过一轮了，依旧是…无人生还……
t_en: We've searched again... but still... no survivors...

t_ch: 现在还不是松懈的时候，至少我们要先把收尾工作处理好。
t_en: Stay focused. We still have cleanup duties to handle.

t_ch: …所以那家伙究竟是个什么来路？
t_en: Remind me... what's the deal with that thing again?

t_ch: 之前完全没听说过！按理说这么强的家伙，不应该啊……
t_en: Never heard of that entity before! Strange for someone so powerful to be off the radar...

t_ch: 根据调查结果看来，面对本次黑潮，树庭的学者本应能够有序组织撤离，人员生还率相对较高，但…那位黑衣剑士的出现改变了一切。
t_en: According to our investigation, the Grove's scholars could have managed an organized evacuation from the black tide, with many survivors, but... everything changed when that black-clad swordmaster appeared.

t_ch: 啧…真是个棘手的家伙，得赶快将新的调查结果汇报上去。
t_en: *Tsk*... he's more trouble than we thought. We should report these new discoveries at once.

t_ch: 果然，他跟着黑潮一起进来了。
t_en: I knew it — he rode in with the black tide.

t_ch: 然后，就沿着这条路……
t_en: And then, along this path...

t_ch: 沿着黑衣剑士的动向，来到了树庭中部。
t_en: Tracking the black-clad swordmaster led you to the Grove's central area.

t_ch: 又是岔道……
t_en: Another intersection...

t_ch: 黑潮难道就不会迷路吗？
t_en: Do black tides never lose their way?

t_ch: 所以，他行凶的方向是……
t_en: Their path of destruction led...

t_ch: 沿着黑衣剑士的动向继续搜索。
t_en: Keep tracking the black-clad swordmaster's trail.

t_ch: 这个方向…也不能幸免啊。
t_en: Not even this area... was safe.

t_ch: 入侵者未免太熟悉树庭了。
t_en: The invader seems unusually familiar with the Grove.

t_ch: 然后…就是「终点」了吧。
t_en: So... this must be the "end."

t_ch: 沿着黑衣剑士的动向，来到了那个与他对峙的场所。
t_en: Tracking the black-clad swordmaster led you to where the final battle occurred.

t_ch: 这样看来……
t_en: From the looks of it...
